name: Australia's Health Revolution with Dr Michael Mosley
original_name: Australia's Health Revolution with Dr Michael Mosley
overview: This landmark documentary series sees renowned British doctor and trusted medical journalist Dr Michael Mosley put his body on the line to tackle the nation's fastest growing chronic disease, Type-2 diabetes. Working alongside Indigenous exercise physiologist Ray Kelly, they reveal how new science can reverse Australia's Type-2 diabetes epidemic.

trailers.title: AUSTRALIA'S HEALTH REVOLUTION WITH DR. MICHAEL MOSLEY  | TRAILER | AVAILABLE ON SBS/ON DEMAND
